top_3_actions.action: Remove the fake original prices immediately. If your real price is $111.25, list it at $111.25 with no sale. An honest price from a new shop builds more trust than a "75% off" sale that nobody believes. If you want to run a real promotion, discount by 10-15% from a genuine original price for a limited time.

Differentiate these 4 listings. Options: different subjects (couple vs pet vs family), different sizes or formats (8x10 vs 16x20, framed vs unframed), different styles (realistic vs impressionist), or bundle them into a single listing with variations. Each listing should have a clearly different first photo so buyers can tell them apart in search results.

Set your real prices as the regular prices and remove all sales. Save promotions for genuine events (holidays, shop anniversary, clearing old stock). A shop-wide permanent sale is one of the strongest "this isn't a serious business" signals on Etsy.
